properties.displayName: Fortigate - 大量データ外部送信 (データ漏洩の疑い)
properties.description: 内部ホストから外部への異常に大きなデータ転送を検出します。データ漏洩 (Data Exfiltration) の兆候を示す可能性があります。閾値は環境に応じて調整してください。
properties.query:
let ThresholdBytes = 104857600; // 100 MB
let KnownInternalRanges = dynamic(["10.", "172.16.", "172.17.", "172.18.", "172.19.", "172.20.", "172.21.", "172.22.", "172.23.", "172.24.", "172.25.", "172.26.", "172.27.", "172.28.", "172.29.", "172.30.", "172.31.", "192.168."]);
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"
| where DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where DeviceAction in ("accept", "allow", "passthrough")
| where isnotempty(SentBytes)
| extend IsInternalDest = iff(DestinationIP has_any (KnownInternalRanges), true, false)
| where IsInternalDest == false
| summarize
    TotalSentBytes = sum(SentBytes),
    TotalReceivedBytes = sum(ReceivedBytes),
    SessionCount = count(),
    DistinctDestIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
    TopDestinations = make_set(DestinationIP, 10),
    TopPorts = make_set(DestinationPort, 10)
    by SourceIP, DeviceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where TotalSentBytes > ThresholdBytes
| extend TotalSentMB = round(toreal(TotalSentBytes) / 1048576, 2)
| extend TotalReceivedMB = round(toreal(TotalReceivedBytes) / 1048576, 2)
| extend SentReceivedRatio = iff(TotalReceivedBytes > 0, round(toreal(TotalSentBytes) / toreal(TotalReceivedBytes), 2), toreal(999))
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    TotalSentMB,
    TotalReceivedMB,
    SentReceivedRatio,
    SessionCount,
    DistinctDestIPs,
    TopDestinations,
    TopPorts,
    DeviceName
